method.name: PromptCGL
method.type: Prompt-based learning paradigm for Continual Graph Learning
key_features: Learns a fixed number of prompts for each unique task
Keeps GNN parameters unchanged during continual learning
Does not require memory buffer for storing historical data

problems_addressed: Traditional GNNs assume static graph structures
Replay-based CGL methods require substantial memory resources
Storage of historical node information raises privacy concerns
key_findings: PromptCGL shows leading performance regardless of memory buffer size
PromptCGL outperforms replay-based methods when buffer size decreases
title: Prompt-Driven Continual Graph Learning
